options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <out_file> # LEF output file name
write out LEF version 5.6
write out LEF version 5.7
write out LEF version 5.8
write out LEF version 6.0

options.name: -PGNets
options.description: Write out PG stripes only on these pg nets ((net)+, optional)

options.name: -PGPinLayers
options.description: Write out PG stripes on these layers ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -add_obs_layers
options.description: Shapes on these layers will be written as OBS shapes in the LEF. Cannot be routing or cut layers.

options.name: -cutObsMinSpacing
options.description: Cut OBS around pin shapes by min-spacing

options.name: -cutObsToExposeRouting
options.description: Cut OBS from the boundary by <microns> to expose routing.

options.name: -design_boundary
options.description: Write out SIZE and OBS based on the design boundary

options.name: -excludeObsLayers
options.description: Do not create OBS shapes on these layers ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -excludePinLayers
options.description: Do not create PIN shapes on these layers ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -extractBlockObs
options.description: Extract OBS from BLOCK, RING, PAD macro above top layer, and write to the LEF file

options.name: -extractBlockPGPinLayers
options.description: Extract PG pins from BLOCK, RING, PAD, COVER macros on these layers ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -extractBlockSignalPinLayers
options.description: <layer_list> Extract signal pins (connected to design term) from BLOCK, RING, PAD, COVER macros on these layers ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -extractRoutingObs
options.description: Extract regular routing and the shiled wire as OBS from the boundary by <microns>

options.name: -extractWellLayerObs
options.description: Extract OBS from instances on specified well layers by merging all shapes into one bounding box ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -extractWellObsByRow
options.description: Extract OBS from the bounding box of rows plus the margin on specified well layers

options.name: -ignoreBumpOnPin
options.description: Do not dump bump shapes on pins

options.name: -ioPadPin
options.description: Write out IO pads that are connected to design pins as LEF pin shapes

options.name: -mergeConnectedWellOnly
options.description: Merge connected well shapes only, instead to merge all shapes into one bounding box

options.name: -noCutObs
options.description: Do not cut OBS shapes around pins

options.name: -obsSpacing
options.description: Write out LEF58_OBSSPACING property in OBS section

options.name: -obsSpacingPerLayer
options.description: Write out the spacing for each layer under layer definition

options.name: -obs_above_top_layer
options.description: Write out OBS shapes rather than one large abstract OBS shape for each special wire and via on these layers that are not PIN shapes. ((layer)+, optional)

options.name: -portForEachStripePin
options.description: A separate LEF port will be created for each pin shape created by -stripePin

options.name: -property
options.description: Write out all user defined design properties

options.name: -selected
options.description: Write out only selected PG stripes as LEF pin shapes

options.name: -specifyTopLayer
options.description: Create OBS up to this layer ((layer), optional)

options.name: -stripePin
options.description: Write out PG stripes on top metal layer as LEF pin shapes
